text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit d9beef938ae7c3189e85e377468f83804de94712
Author:     Fuqian Huang <huangfq.daxian@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2019-06-17 10:29:56 +0000
Commit:     Warner Losh <imp@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-02-05 00:47:21 +0000

    mpt: print req->index rather than the pointer itself in mpt.c

    Print req->index instead of printing the pointer itself to avoid kernel
    pointer leakage.

    PR: 238661
    Signed-off-by: Fuqian Huang <huangfq.daxian@gmail.com>
    Reviewed-by: imp

 sys/dev/mpt/mpt.c | 4 ++--
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
